annotator_steps: Find the authoritative paper record for Attention Is All You Need.
Identify the actual publication venue/source attribution from the primary record.
Distinguish authorship or organizational affiliation from publication venue.
Reject provenance claims that conflate Google affiliation with publication venue.
V1-R06.true_answer: Attention Is All You Need was published as a NeurIPS 2017 conference paper; authorship and organizational affiliation should not be conflated with publication venue.
accepted_answers: It appeared as a NeurIPS 2017 conference paper.
The paper was published at NeurIPS 2017, not simply 'by Google'.
Google researchers authored it, but the publication venue was NeurIPS 2017.
